task_completion.description: Verify that an inventory named 'Lab Reagents Q4-2024' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface shows an inventory titled 'Lab Reagents Q4-2024' in the Inventories section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required custom columns have been added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inventory table headers or column settings display 'CAS Number', 'Molecular Weight (g/mol)', 'Storage Condition', and 'Expiration Date'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Sodium Chloride was added with the correct properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row or item detail view shows Name: 'Sodium Chloride', CAS Number: '7647-14-5', Molecular Weight: '58.44', Storage Condition: 'Room Temperature', and Expiration Date: '12/31/2025' (or locale equivalent date format).

task_completion.description: Verify that Tris-HCl was added with the correct properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row or item detail view shows Name: 'Tris-HCl', CAS Number: '1185-53-1', Molecular Weight: '157.60' (or '157.6'), Storage Condition: '2-8°C', and Expiration Date: '06/30/2025' (or locale equivalent date format).

task_completion.description: Verify that Dimethyl Sulfoxide was added with the correct properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row or item detail view shows Name: 'Dimethyl Sulfoxide', CAS Number: '67-68-5', Molecular Weight: '78.13', Storage Condition: 'Room Temperature', and Expiration Date: '03/15/2026' (or locale equivalent date format).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the SciNote web interface to create the inventory and items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the SciNote UI in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the genuine SciNote web application, not a mockup, local HTML file, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the expected output into a generic spreadsheet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into SciNote's inventory system, not Excel, Google Sheets, or a similar external program.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected inventory name: 'Lab Reagents Q4-2024'. Expected items and properties: 1) Sodium Chloride: CAS 7647-14-5, MW 58.44, Storage Room Temperature. 2) Tris-HCl: CAS 1185-53-1, MW 157.6, Storage 2-8°C. 3) Dimethyl Sulfoxide: CAS 67-68-5, MW 78.13, Storage Room Temperature. Expiration dates should match the task description (12/31/2025, 06/30/2025, 03/15/2026 respectively, formatted according to the browser's locale).
